programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Huge meaty flavor—combined with spice, smoke, and fire—epitomizes Texas barbecue. Could we figure out how to make authentic Texas beef ribs in our Boston-based test kitchen?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On occasion, we break the bank and buy a beef tenderloin. The tender, buttery interior is the big draw, and the combination of a healthy dose of seasoning and the flavor from the grill is a perfect solution to an otherwise mild-tasting piece of meat.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare grilled chicken with a sweet-and-sour dipping sauce and grilled salmon with a sweet, sticky glaze.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare chicken enchiladas and Mexican rice.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sure, raw tomato sauces are fast, but if the sauce is watery and bland, who cares? Likewise, asparagus-based pasta sauces are often bland and boring. In this episode, we keep things simple while avoiding these common problems.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen prepares two Indian favorites: chicken biryani and mulligatawny soup.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Osso buco, literally "bone with a hole," is the Italian term for veal shanks. This meaty cut, akin to beef shanks or lamb shanks, becomes meltingly tender when stewed for several hours in a covered pot. We serve it with a simple and satisfying polenta.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The holidays are stressful enough. We created a foolproof rolled butter cookie dough that tasted great and can be turned into an array of different cookies.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A pair of brothers can't see eye-to-eye on how to run their business, so one of them takes a run.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to a tiny bar in China Grove, Texas, to help a couple on the verge of retirement stop enabling their belligerent daughter.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help two burnout rockers turned bar owners grow up in order to save their business, which is currently losing $100,000 a year.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to San Antonio to help a "cool mom" owner stop partying and start running her business like a professional.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A party-hungry owner's bar and marriage may go up in flames if Jon is unable to turn things around and instill some responsibility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two long-time postal employees' failing pizza bar is on the brink of closing its doors for good unless Jon Taffer can find a way to rescue both the bar and their friendship.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his first-ever emergency rescue, Jon uses his last resort to help the overwhelmed and grieving owner of Buffalo City Bar & Grille save her father's legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to help the owner of New England's Ale House Grille, a single mom who's become reliant on a rude, incompetent manager since her husband left.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: To save the Whiskey Girl Saloon in the historic Fort Worth Stockyards, Jon must get an inexperienced co-owner to abandon his hard-partying alter ego, Rick Roundhouse.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two best friends are acting more like jackasses than owners and find themselves on the verge of losing their dream.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to fix the negligent behavior at Harbor Point Club & Grill in Richardson, Texas, where owners drink the profits away, and the staff struggles to get one order right.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a decade of success, a drag racing bar owner is seeing his profits go up in smoke.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny McCarthy joins Jon to help the Thunderbolt Bar & Grill, whose owner is an inexperienced man with poor leadership skills, and his only ally is threatening to withdraw her services.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Owners Mark and Ozzie call on Jon for a second time when they need help with their outdated and failing bar, The Edge of Town, in Blue Springs, MO.

programme.title: Bellator 131: Ortiz vs. Bonnar
programme.desc: The talking is over. Bonnar. Ortiz. Time to fight.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Thackerville, Oklahoma with the Bantamweight title on the line as Joe Warren defends his strap against Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu World Champion Marcos Galvao. And Ryan Couture faces off against Dakota Cochrane in a lightweight clash.

programme.title: Bellator 138: Kimbo vs Shamrock
programme.desc: Bellator MMA presents a grudge match seven years in the making as Kimbo Slice finally meets Ken Shamrock. Patricio Pitbull goes to war with Daniel Weichel for the featherweight title. Plus WWE superstar Bobby Lashley and Michael Chandler return to action.

programme.title: Bellator 144: Halsey vs Carvalho
programme.desc: The middleweight title is on the line as Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with Rafael Carvalho vs. Brandon Halsey. And walking highlight reel Michael “MVP” Page is in action, along with submission specialist Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator 148: Daley vs Uhrich
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Fresno, California as feared knockout artist Paul Daley looks to make a highlight reel out of Andy Uhrich, while heavy-handed Patricky Pitbull aims to add another KO to his record when he takes on the son of an icon, Ryan Couture.

programme.title: Bellator 153: Koreshkov vs Henderson
programme.desc: Benson Henderson makes his Bellator debut against Champion Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose, California with a highly anticipated matchup be-tween King Mo and Phil Mr. Wonderful Davis. Also, hard-hitting lightweight Saad “The Assassin” Awad and submission ace Adam Piccolotti aim to impress.

programme.title: Bellator 158: Lima v Daley
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades England as Paul Daley and Douglas Lima meet in a long-awaited showdown between welterweight knockout artists. And don’t miss Michael “MVP” Page as he looks to go viral against Cyborg Santos. Plus Matt Mitrione and James Gallagher!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Memphis as former middleweight champion Alexander Shlemenko takes on Kendall “Da Spyda” Grove. And WWE superstar Bobby Lashley looks to continue his winning ways against Josh Appelt in a battle of hard-hitting heavyweights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA goes global as it emanates from Tel Aviv, Israel for a highly anticipated rematch between Andrey Koreshkov and Douglas Lima for the welterweight title in whats sure to be an action-packed main-event between two of the best in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the SAP Center in San Jose with a long awaited lightweight title showdown between champ Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson, and another pair of hard-hitting lightweights collide as Brandon Girtz faces off with Adam Piccolotti.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rachel says she hates her mother, Aundrea, who is an embarrassment, and who stole her childhood due to her alcoholism & a pill addiction. Aundrea admits she's an alcoholic and a liar, & says she is keeping two dark and embarrassing secrets.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After 21 years, Paula is considering divorcing husband, Jeremy, saying he's "clueless, absent & non-verbal." Jeremy says it's Paula--controlling & a grudge-holder. Find out Jeremy's mistake. Dr. Phil and Robin share the secret to their 45-year marriage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a beautiful mother of two, vanished in 2009. Her husband, Josh, was considered a person of interest & what began as an unsolved mystery tragically ended with the murder-suicide of Josh Powell & their two sons, Charles, 7, & Braden, 5.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From sending sexual text messages to taking a punch to the face for fun, today's teens are engaging in outrageous trends. Dr. Phil helps parents decide what behavior is normal and what is out of control.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pam says her ex-husband, Ed, is enabling, Andee's, 24, addiction by giving her money, which she uses for drugs. Ed admits he allows Andee to manipulate him but says he's afraid she'll resort to prostitution or worse. Can Ed learn to change his approach?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Paula says her 19-year-old daughter, Kylie is on a path of self-destruction, but Kylie says Paula is at fault for being a bad role model. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pregnancy is a time of baby showers, nesting, indulging food cravings and being pampered. But Dr. Phil’s guests, Shayna, says she's been pregnant more than a year, and Zona, says she's been pregnant over 3 1/2 years, Both are looking for answers why.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says she's fed up with husband Jason's, mom, Kathy. Angie says her mother-in-law is rude, judgmental & meddles. Kathy says Angie is a liar & cheater & she's responsible for all the drama. Can Dr. Phil help these in-laws put years of animosity aside?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's interview with death row inmate Rodney Reed continues. Reed's attorney, Bryce Benjet tells what he thinks happened to Stacey. Retired NYPD detective Kevin Gannon & criminologist Dr. Lee Gilbertson say they know who killed Stacey & how.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kirby made headlines -- and spent 13 weeks in jail -- after his wife, Renee, videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. Hear why Kirby claims Renee left him no choice but to act as he did. Plus, what other behavior did Renee catch on camera? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he is in a bitter custody battle with ex Kimberly, who's kept him from seeing their three kids. Kimberly says Brad is unstable & irresponsible and until he cleans up his act, he can't see their kids. Can these exes learn to peacefully co-parent?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of the cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdale's dog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampett's before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: New Kid on the Block Joey McIntyre; playwright Michael R. Jackson ("Teeth," "A Strange Loop").

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Michelle has spent her life looking for her biological family and recently connected with a woman who could be her sister; Glenda says her husband, Tavares, betrayed her by spending the night with her mother, who says she is jealous and insecure.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A teen resists paying for damages after borrowing and crashing a friend's car; testimony from a recorded interview with an insurance company helps to seal the fate of a motorist and a bicyclist who slammed into each other.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A man says his ex-roommate smashed his flat-screen TV with a hammer; a woman's birthday party ends with a fight over money and accusations of underage drinking.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers
programme.desc: A stay-at-home wife believes her deliveryman husband is sleeping with women he meets along his delivery route.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers
programme.desc: He had plans to make her his wife, but instead a man appears in court to find out if his girlfriend is still cheating and if he fathered her 2-year-old son.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers
programme.desc: A man suspects his wife is cheating after finding a picture of another man's privates in her cellphone.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers
programme.desc: A heartbroken new mother suspects her fiancé is cheating with a female acquaintance and one of his exes.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court
programme.desc: After his girlfriend went on a camping trip with another man, an Illinois man questions if he is her son's biological father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court
programme.desc: A 25-year-old woman and her family come to court to find out if the man she grew up calling Dad is really her biological father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court
programme.desc: A woman receives a sexually explicit text message from another man that leaves her former fiance doubting the paternity of her daughter.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court
programme.desc: Two women come to court to find out if a grieving mother's deceased son fathered their children.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A country singer (Robert Goulet) accused of stealing songs accidentally kills his accuser; guest Gary Crosby.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: DeLong warns Gillespie about a carjacking victim, a lawyer (Linda Gehringer) who has taken a romantic interest in Bubba.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil's investigation into the apparent suicide of a waitress leads him to an old college acquaintance who was the last person to be seen with the victim.

programme.title: Underclassman
programme.desc: A rookie policeman (Nick Cannon) works under cover at a prep school to investigate the mysterious death of a student.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Asa visits the Diamond Water bottling plant; Reza and Adam decide to move in together; GG pressures her boyfriend into making a commitment; MJ and Lilly meet face-to-face, leaving the others to choose sides.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: MJ's time back in the fold is short-lived; GG retaliates against MJ; Mike helps his family plan a party.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Vanina continues to report to work after her breakdown; Jeff has an opportunity to buy another house, which means more change is on the horizon; Jenni has good news, then an illness threatens her health and her hope for a growing family.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: As the baby's due date approaches, Jeff and his team rush to make final preparations; worried about missing the birth, Jeff and Gage head to northern California to wait for the call; after nine months of pregnancy, they finally meet their daughter.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff and Gage bring baby Monroe home; a three-month hiatus sees major changes at the JLD office, including Vanina's absence and a revolving door of nannies; the office assistant leaves after writing a detailed criticism of his time at the office.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff refuses to let his newborn baby slow him down; he plans to move into his New Hollywood project to make room for the end of construction at Vista Valley; Gage lags behind, leaving Jeff to wonder if the tension between them will ever subside.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Moving day proves difficult for Jeff and Gage, as they have to work around Monroe's nap and feeding schedules; following the tumultuous move, the trio is finally able to settle into a routine; a client introduces Jeff to socialite Jackie Siegel.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Monroe's new nanny seems to be a great fit; the team heads to Florida to tour socialite Jackie Siegel's Versailles mansion, which is the largest and most expensive single-family house in the United States and represents a job opportunity for Jeff.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Back from Orlando, Fla., Jeff prepares his father's condominium for the market, schedules more demolition at Valley Vista and goes house hunting with one of his favorite clients, Jeanne Shaw; then, the childcare situation takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: In the wake of Gema's exit, Jeff receives a text message full of shocking accusations; drama ensues between the remaining housekeepers; Jeff and Gage juggle work and home life; when Jeff and Zoila meet, their conversation takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff and Gage face numerous challenges, caring for a newborn, moving into a new home and pushing the business into different directions, but Monroe's baptism is an opportunity to celebrate their blessings.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff focuses on flipping properties; there have been multiple additions to the team, with Jeff relying heavily on his new full-time assistant, Tyler; when Jenni returns from maternity leave, Jeff is not exactly sure where she fits in.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Gage lands a photo shoot for Jeff with furniture company Alder & Tweed; while the JLD crew scrambles to get everything in place, Jeff remains focused on Valley Vista; Jeff fails to endear himself to his new clients.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: The team heads to New York City; it's Monroe's first trip, making Jeff and Gage nervous; Jeff charters a private plane and brings along Monroe's nanny and grandparents; the team searches for real estate for Jeff's client, Julie Grossi.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff's project managers clash, only adding to the chaos he was hoping to alleviate; neighbor Lea Black is back in town and ready to get to work on renovating her kitchen; Jeff runs into trouble with another neighbor.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff and Gage compete over who does what around the house and whose flip is moving along the fastest; new troubles pop up at Valley Vista and Old Hollywood; team JLD is rehired by Calabasas clients Liat and Trevor.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff's grandmother is rushed to the hospital; the added pressure doesn't stop any of his projects from moving forward; Jeff takes his frustration out on his employees and reevaluates who should remain on the payroll.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sigue la pista a un recluso fugitivo que cose la boca a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sospecha que un par de asesinos trabajan juntos, después de destapar dos cuerpos aparentemente no relacionados entre sí.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando McGee mata a un hombre durante una misión, el equipo del NCIS interviene para respaldarle cuando descubren que el hombre era un agente de policía encubierto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan el asesinato de una supermodelo que graba un reality show en una base de los Marines.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo se apresuran a encontrar a Tony y Ziva, que quedan atrapados en un contenedor en un astillero tras buscar refugio de un tiroteo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo tienen que intervenir un fin de semana cuando un teniente comandante de la Marina encargado de un cargamento de armas nucleares es aparentemente secuestrado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing suspect claims to be a federal informant, officers inspect an erratically driven car and find a safe, and a familiar face swears this time she's going to rehab.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dress a naked man who is causing a disturbance, a barefoot man denies evading police, and an intoxicated woman and her husband tell two different stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shoplifter flees on foot after stealing kids' shoes, an erratic driver has a concealed firearm (and something less concealed), and a man on probation gets his car searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver theorizes about America after fleeing a traffic stop, charges keep adding up for an unlicensed driver, and a woman stops at nothing to get to her trailer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers suspect meth use by a man sleeping in a bus station, a pedestrian's multiple bags of drugs suggest trafficking, and a drunk driver claims she was set up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A burglary results in an act of solidarity, a foot pursuit ends when the K-9 unit shows up, and a person with a substance user disorder leaves a strong impression on an officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a motorcycle evades an officer, a woman in a suspicious vehicle accrues multiple charges, and a traffic stop reveals two men under the influence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes a stolen vehicle into a house, a woman who took a cell phone video of her ex explains the dispute to officers, and a man is stopped for suspected trespassing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police are led on a lengthy chase, a man is pulled over in a new car he doesn't own, and a detained woman has choice words about her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in hiding is sniffed out quickly by the K-9 unit, a couple gets caught lying when an officer recognizes them, and a woman's dogs save her a trip to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist tries to escape on foot, a couple's synthetic marijuana use catches up with them, and an officer tries to get the real story behind a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A skittish driver’s decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat. An innocent woman struggles with the decision to press charges on her friend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A soft-spoken cyclist finds a way to shock deputies. A family man remorsefully agrees with police that his COVID-19 fears led him to make a mistake. Officers investigate a car they spot swerving on the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a truck discovers what happens when you don’t lock your door. Police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices. An officer acts as a therapist for multiple people and their relationships.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain. Deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A violent murder in a casino parking garage and another episode in the police interview room lead the CSIs to one shocking discovery after another.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine, and Nick try to determine the cause of a house fire that kills a teenage girl. The fire is in the same neighborhood as a similar arson fire. Grissom and Sara investigate a man found dead with letter tiles in his stomach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine, and Nick investigate the death of a runner during a competition. Meanwhile, Sara and Warrick investigate the death of a couple in a hotel room, initially thought to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A roller coaster runs off its track, leaving six people dead. The CSI team investigates whether this was an accident or foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El sheriff está sometido a presiones políticas para que descubra quién mató a un comisario aéreo con un coche bomba del que el sheriff fue testigo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un adolescente aparece asesinado en una obra en construcción. Grissom, Sara y Warrick siguen la pista de la sangre en un martillo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El único miembro del jurado que se resistía a votar aparece muerto en la sala del jurado. Los once jurados que votaban culpable y que odiaban al jurado muerto son los sospechosos naturales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer aparece asesinada en su casa. Su parecido con Sara hace que Grissom se interese personalmente por el caso y le obliga a examinar las decisiones que ha tomado en su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick responden a una electrocución en un casino. El casino alberga antigüedades japonesas. La electrocución no es más que una treta para robar la pieza central de la exposición.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un robo en una tienda de comestibles acaba en un tiroteo que deja cinco muertos. El policía cree que Grissom le guarda rencor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo debe investigar un crimen en el que un marido y su esposa, estrella del porno, fueron asesinados al estilo ejecución.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y Sara se enfrentan a la muerte de lo que al principio parece ser un travesti.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo femenino mutilado es descubierto atado a los bajos de un autobús que transporta presas de un correccional de mujeres, después de que un brazo amputado salga volando de debajo del vehículo y golpee un coche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un violento asesinato en el aparcamiento de un casino y otro episodio en la sala de interrogatorios de la policía llevan a los CSI a un sorprendente descubrimiento tras otro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine y Nick intentan determinar la causa del incendio de una casa en el que muere una adolescente. El incendio se produce en el mismo barrio que otro incendio provocado similar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Nick investigan la muerte de un corredor durante una competición. Mientras tanto, Sara y Warrick investigan la muerte de una pareja en una habitación de hotel, que inicialmente se pensó que había sido un asesinato-suicidio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una montaña rusa se sale de la vía y deja seis muertos. El equipo de CSI investiga si se trata de un accidente o de juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes aparecen asesinados tras estafar a los casinos de Sam Braun.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate the murder of an eastern European immigrant stabbed to death in a peep show booth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team race to find new evidence for a murder trial already underway in order to avoid the conviction of a possibly innocent man.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine undercover trip to the incinerator to dispose of drug evidence, but the police officers are ambushed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's case of a murdered woman is compromised when the federal agents, who have their own agenda to follow, get involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An ex-con who Horatio sent to jail asks him to help find his missing son. He finds marijuana while searching the boy’s room.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Students from all over the country descend on Miami for a week of fun in the sun. The party comes to a halt when the CSIs are called in on two cases.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle and Delko are enjoying a hot Miami nightspot, "Club Descent," when the DJ's pyrotechnics triggers a fire that engulfs the club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs delve into the "tweaker" culture after a brutal murder and near-fatal explosion takes place at the home of a methamphetamine addict.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio is called to the Miami West Detention Center to investigate a murdered inmate, he ends up witnessing three inmates escape.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a young model is killed by a hit and run driver, Horatio investigates the car's owner, who claims he loaned it out to the guests at his party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man harpooned to his yacht leads Horatio into the world of modern-day treasure hunting and the massive greed that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tennis phenom Lana Walker is taken from her bedroom in the night and the only evidence they have to go on is a purple fiber found in the window frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a former rape victim is beaten to within inches of her life, Horatio must enter the world of prisons and parolees to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a robbery/homicide leaves two men dead and a third still alive, Horatio is determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el aparente asesinato de una universitaria, mientras que Delko tiene misteriosas visiones del difunto Tim Speedle.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que Internet convierte a una alumna de secundaria en un símbolo sexual internacional, la información divulgada sobre Horatio pone su vida en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI buscan exhaustivamente al hijo de Horatio después de que desaparece durante una sorprendente y mortal fuga de prisión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Asesinan a una leyenda del deporte y la investigación se complica cuando el laboratorio pierde el cuerpo. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Acontecimientos extraños empiezan a afectar al equipo de CSI mientras persiguen a un asesino en serie que atacó durante un eclipse total de sol.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una modelo se electrocuta en la pasarela, el caso lleva a Horatio y al equipo de CSI de vuelta al hijo de Horatio y a su archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando unas vacaciones familiares se vuelven mortales, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que los supervivientes hagan justicia por mano propia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un atentado contra la vida de Calleigh pone en peligro su vida personal y profesional. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El estilo de vida de los ricos y famosos está bajo el microscopio de Horatio y el equipo de CSI cuando la niñera de una familia adinerada aparece muerta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una ametralladora rara e ilegal evapora a tres contrabandistas de armas, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que el arma cause más muertes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La ex de Horatio, y madre de Kyle, resurge en Miami como la viuda de un multimillonario que hará cualquier cosa para recuperar a su hijo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de una mujer, el equipo de CSI descubre un laboratorio de metanfetamina en su apartamento y a un agente del FBI sin escrúpulos con una vida secreta propia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan un asesinato en una boda, las pistas finalmente llevan a los CSI a un club de striptease local.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El pasado de Horatio vuelve para perseguirlo cuando Julia lo arresta por asesinato. El equipo de CSI debe investigar para absolverlo.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Lindsay discover why a young dancer with a winning lottery ticket in her pocket was thrown from the Roosevelt Bridge Island Tram.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The witness to a brutal elevator slaying has disappeared, and as the CSIs track her down they uncover the world of Manhattan “Lolitas.”

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and CSI Miami Lieutenant Horatio Caine follow the evidence from steamy Miami to steely New York as they close in on Henry Darius.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, the CSIs work to find out why what they thought was a cheater’s revenge was misidentification.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll “hospital”, Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll “doctor” beneath hundreds of body parts – doll body parts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A rising roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a bout, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate the death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead in his bedroom, when Danny begins to process the scene he trips a panic button, sealing himself in with the victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Amor sanguíneo (S6 Ep 14)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una mujer joven muerta en el Central Park, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York es atraído hacia la misteriosa subcultura del vampirismo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fórmula (S6 Ep 15)
programme.desc: Cuando una leyenda de las carreras de autos muere en una feroz explosión, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que la causa es una alteración en el auto.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El reinando de la incertidumbre (S6 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a cuatro víctimas muertas en una habitación de hotel y el principal sospechoso aparece empuñando un hacha, el equipo de CSI intenta reconstruir los detalles.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La olla de oro (S6 Ep 17)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a dos jóvenes periodistas muertos en la víspera del Día de San Patricio, el equipo de CSI intenta encontrar la pista al final del arco iris.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Descansa en paz, Marina Garito (S6 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer, la evidencia y la autopsia sugieren suicidio, pero Stella no está convencida y arriesga su vida para continuar con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redención (S6 Ep19)
programme.desc: El último pedido de un condenado a muerte lleva a Hawkes a una cárcel de Pensilvania y se enfrenta a un secreto personal justo cuando estalla un motín en la prisión.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sospechosos inesperados (S6 Ep20)
programme.desc: El asesinato a tiros de un chico de 14 años frente a su hermano de 12 años lleva el deseo de justicia del detective Mac Taylor a otro nivel.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Desde el subsuelo (S6 Ep21)
programme.desc: Cuando una losa de concreto comienza a chorrear sangre en el centro de la ciudad, la investigación del equipo de CSI los lleva a un mundo clandestino de peleas brutales.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Punto de vista (S6 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de ser herido, Mac observa a sus vecinos mientras se recupera y es testigo de una actividad misteriosa que conduce a asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Escapada en vacaciones (S6 Ep23)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York sigue un rastro que dejó Shane Casey y se da cuenta de que por venganza, él tiene en la mira a Danny, que está de vacaciones.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Piso 34 (S7 Ep1)
programme.desc: El miembro más nuevo del equipo de CSI de Nueva York, como bienvenida, se topa con una mujer asesinada en el edificio del laboratorio de criminalística de la policía de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Plática poco amigable (S7 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando una joven parece ser estrangulada mientras está en un chat en vivo que Adam presencia, el equipo de CSI debe determinar si fue real o una broma.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Condenado, si lo haces (S7 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una pareja golpeada en su casa, el equipo de CSI cree que tiene al sospechoso después de que una madre identifica a su hijo, pero no todo es lo que parece.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sangre por sangre (S7 Ep4)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un poderoso líder de una pandilla, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe encontrar al asesino antes de que estalle una guerra callejera.

programme.desc: The police chase a stolen car belonging to an off-duty officer.

programme.desc: Stolen pickup truck pursued and captured in Orange Country; suspect caught with tactical pit maneuver by CHP.

programme.desc: CHP arrests pursuit suspect after an hour-long chase through OC, LA.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Pursuit Of Reckless Driving Suspect Ends With Driver In Custody.

programme.desc: Woman leads deputies on pursuit through Compton in a bread truck.

programme.title: Car Chase

programme.title: El camino del oeste
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta suntuosa historia de los hombres y mujeres que dejaron la comodidad y seguridad de sus vidas por la promesa de una tierra libre y una vida mejor en el indómito Oeste.

programme.title: La rebelión de los colgados
programme.desc: Un grupo de trabajadores rebeldes del campamento maderero de la selva mexicana se insurrecciona ante condiciones inhumanas de trabajo. Luchan por justicia y mejores condiciones, desafiando la opresión en búsqueda de dignidad y derechos laborales.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Oro sangriento
programme.desc: Prepárate para una acción trepidante y explosiva, mientras Sabata, el misterioso pistolero de ojos de acero, descubre quién esta detrás de un elaborado atraco a un banco he impone su justicia con las balas, en una ciudad culpable.

programme.title: Cometieron dos errores
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood protagoniza esta historia sobre una banda de justicieros que cometen dos errores: ahorcar al hombre equivocado y no terminar el trabajo. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern y Dennis Hopper coprotagonizan este western de acción.

programme.title: Joe, el implacable
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds, Aldo Sambrell y Fernando Rey protagonizan este lujurioso y valiente western de acción sobre un intrépido indio con una implacable venganza contra la banda de forajidos que mató a su pueblo.

programme.title: El solista
programme.desc: Un periodista de Los Ángeles descubre a un músico brillante y distraído, de pasión inagotable. Su amistad y vínculos únicos les transformará la vida a ambos.

programme.title: Perdiendo a mi hijo
programme.desc: "Jessica Lange interpreta a una madre adoptiva que da a un niño abandonado una nueva oportunidad en la vida. Halle Berry es la madre biológica que limpia su vida y se dispone a reclamar al niño."

programme.title: La prueba
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar Gwyneth Paltrow y Anthony Hopkins protagonizan la historia de una joven atormentada por el pasado de su padre y la sombra de su futuro. Basada en la obra ganadora del Pulitzer, Proof presenta a Jake Gyllenhaal y Hope Davis.

programme.title: El solista
programme.desc: Un periodista de Los Ángeles descubre a un músico brillante y distraído, de pasión inagotable. Su amistad y vínculos únicos les transformará la vida a ambos.

programme.title: Lo que perdimos en el camino
programme.desc: Una viuda reciente invita al afligido mejor amigo de su marido a vivir con ella y a sus dos hijos. A medida que esto comienza a cambiar su vida, también ayuda a la familia a salir adelante y afrontar su pérdida.

programme.title: Sin Rastro

programme.title: Besos que matan

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: Adultos jóvenes

programme.title: Margot en la boda
programme.desc: En vísperas de la boda de su distanciada hermana Paulin con Malcolm, un músico desempleado, artista y depresivo, en la casa de playa familiar, Margot aparece para reavivar el vínculo con su hermana y ofrecer su propio tipo de "apoyo".

programme.title: Adultos jóvenes

programme.title: El informante

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: ternacional Donnie Yen repite su papel icónico como el gran maestro de kung fu, Ip Man.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Donnie Yen regresa a la exitosa serie de artes marciales de Ip Man. Cuando un desarrollador de bienes raíces corrupto (Mike Tyson) y su pandilla brutal intentan tomar control de la ciudad, Master Ip decide luchar contra ellos.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento 2
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: Asesino perfecto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme se enfrenta a su oponente más letal hasta el momento, él mismo, cuando interpreta tanto a un atroz asesino en serie como al clon replicado que los científicos han construido para matarlo.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento
programme.desc: El maestro de Ninjutsu Frank Dux viaja a Hong Kong para participar en el Kumite, las olimpiadas de artes marciales, y conoce a una hermosa periodista estadounidense. Al poco tiempo deberá enfrentarse a Chong-Li, un despiadado maestro coreano de taekwondo.

programme.title: Doble impacto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme hace el papel de los gemelos, Chad y Alex Wagner, hermanos separados tras el brutal asesinato de sus padres. Veinticinco años después, el destino los reúne para vengarse y causar un dolor doble.

programme.title: Gafas amarillas
programme.desc: Luego de una separación, Julia se muda a un frío departamento donde enfrenta los conflictos cotidianos de la soledad. Julia encuentra un nuevo comienzo cuando tiene una aventura con Darío, un atractivo mesero con ínfulas de poeta.

programme.title: Hermosa juventud
programme.desc: Natalia y Carlos, son dos jóvenes enamorados de 20 años, que luchan por sobrevivir en la España actual. Para ganar algo de dinero deciden rodar una película porno amateur. El nacimiento de su hija, Julia, será el principal motor de sus cambios.

programme.title: Day of the Dead: Celebration of Life
programme.desc: Each year, the spirits of the dead visit the living in this fascinating look into this famous Mexican tradition.

programme.title: Gafas amarillas
programme.desc: Luego de una separación, Julia se muda a un frío departamento donde enfrenta los conflictos cotidianos de la soledad. Julia encuentra un nuevo comienzo cuando tiene una aventura con Darío, un atractivo mesero con ínfulas de poeta.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros II
programme.desc: Tras el asesinato de su familia, Martin se adentra en las tierras baldías de Estados Unidos en busca de Mister con la esperanza de volver a asociarse con él para combatir una nueva amenaza de vampiros.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, en un trágico accidente en el Día de San Valentín, cinco mineros murieron cuando sus supervisores dejaron su cargo para ir a un baile. Después de un año de la catástrofe, el único superviviente regresa al pueblo con una sangrienta venganza.

programme.title: Halloween VI: La maldición de Michael Myers
programme.desc: El pueblo de Haddonfield, Illinois, celebra Halloween por primera vez en cinco años, pero el asesino en masa maníaco Michael Myers se une a las festividades, con su némesis, el Dr. Loomis, un empedernido psiquiatra, pisándole los talones.

programme.title: Halloween: 20 años después
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, el mal escapó bajo la forma de Michael Myers, lo cual llevó a una sangrienta matanza en Halloween. Ahora, Michael ha vuelto para aterrorizar a una nueva generación, comenzando por la sobreviviente Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).

programme.title: Halloween VIII: Resurrección
programme.desc: Un grupo de universitarios gana un concurso para pasar la noche en el hogar de la infancia del brutal asesino serial Michael Myers. Esperan asustarse un poco, pero no están preparados para lo que los espera en la aterradora secuela de HALLOWEEN H20.

programme.title: Halloween VI: La maldición de Michael Myers
programme.desc: El pueblo de Haddonfield, Illinois, celebra Halloween por primera vez en cinco años, pero el asesino en masa maníaco Michael Myers se une a las festividades, con su némesis, el Dr. Loomis, un empedernido psiquiatra, pisándole los talones.

programme.title: Halloween: 20 años después
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, el mal escapó bajo la forma de Michael Myers, lo cual llevó a una sangrienta matanza en Halloween. Ahora, Michael ha vuelto para aterrorizar a una nueva generación, comenzando por la sobreviviente Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).

programme.title: Ni en tus sueños
programme.desc: En esta comedia, Kirk, un tipo común, no puede creer su suerte cuando la exitosa y preciosa Molly se enamora de él. Sus amigos listos, su familia loca y hasta su insoportable exnovia están tan conmocionados como él.

programme.title: Verano de locura
programme.desc: Carl Reiner (The Jerk) dirige esta historia sobre un padre de familia que toma unas vacaciones normales y alquila una finca de verano en Florida.

programme.title: Envidia
programme.desc: Un hombre empieza a sentir cada vez más celos del nuevo éxito de su amigo.

programme.title: Quemando ruedas
programme.desc: El lisonjero vendedor Don Ready (Jeremy Piven) y su alocado equipo de cerradores tienen un fin de semana para vender más de 200 autos y demostrar que cuando se trata de estafar, conspirar y de usar todo tipo de artimañas, ¡ellos tienen lo necesario!

programme.title: Un fantasma fastidioso
programme.desc: Ghost Town es una comedia romántica enérgica. Es la historia de Bertram Pincus, un dentista malhumorado de Manhattan que desarrolla la habilidad poco grata de ver gente muerta.

programme.title: Perdidos en Nueva York
programme.desc: La pasión del matrimonio entre Henry y Nancy Clark desapareció hace mucho tiempo. Pero ahora su hijo menor ha abandonado el nido y los Clarks tienen la oportunidad de trasladarse a Nueva York.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: Del director George Clooney, Suburbicon es el lugar perfecto para Gardner Lodge (Matt Damon) y su familia. Pero esa tranquilidad oculta una realidad perturbadora, y Gardner deberá navegar por el submundo de traición, engaño y violencia de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los top five
programme.desc: Escrita, dirigida y protagonizada por Chris Rock, Los top five cuenta la historia de un comediante neoyorquino convertido en estrella de cine, Andre Allen, cuyo inesperado encuentro con una reportera lo obliga a enfrentarse con su carrera de comediante

programme.title: My Heroes have Always Been Cowboys
programme.desc: In this inspiring western drama, a retired rodeo rider decides to take on an undefeated bull after returning home and learning of his father’s illness.

programme.title: Black Fox
programme.desc: This wild Western tells of Alan Johnson (Christopher Reeve, "Superman") and his friend whom he freed from slavery as they settle with their families in Texas in the 1860s and begin a new life.

programme.title: Black Fox 2: The Price of Peace
programme.desc: The western saga continues as Alan's family is caught in the deadly crossfire of a revenge plot against Britt. After Alan's wife is slain, he and Britt hunt the bigot responsible for her death.

programme.title: Trail To San Antone
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to help a young jockey get back on track after an “accident” arranged by a horse trainer ruins his career. Action-packed adventure with fantastic stunts, and Gene Autry's Champion.

programme.title: Whirlwind
programme.desc: Gene Autry arrives in Red Bluff to work on the investigation of mail robberies. U.S. Bonds are stolen, and Smiley finds burned fragments of them. A henchman confesses who the guilty party is.

programme.title: The Last Of The Mohicans
programme.desc: As Alice and Cora Munro attempt to find their father they are set upon by French soldiers and their cohorts, Huron tribesmen. Fighting to rescue the women are Chingachgook the last of the Mohican tribe, and the frontiersman known as Hawkeye.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Stagecoach

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un residente que hacía tiempo vivía en el pequeño pueblo de Lefroy, Tasmania, fue asesinado fuera de su hogar. El robo pareció ser el motivo, pero sin sospechosos, la investigación se detiene.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pura suerte
programme.desc: En 1991, la esposa de un militar fue brutalmente asesinada en Filipinas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos sospechosos están vinculados a un asesinato por unas botas manchadas de sangre y una pistola, pero el dueño de los artículos dice que nunca conoció a la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cazador de Colorado que había recibido tres disparos fue víctima de un crimen bien planeado. Los investigadores sospecharon dos armas y dos asesinos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Falso testimonio
programme.desc: La muerte de una mujer en Pensilvania desencadena una investigación por homicidio sobre la muerte de otra mujer en Carolina del Norte.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To be a DCC, you need to look like a DCC. This week Kelli makes sure all the girls have the look. The final rehearsal of the week brings emotions to the forefront as a girl gets sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the candidates enter the sixth week of training camp they need to start looking like a DCC or their spot is in jeopardy. Melissa Rycroft and former DCC Tina Kalina sit in for Judy and give Kelli some fresh eyes.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With three girls left to cut and the first game around the corner, the pressure is intense as the girls return to AT&T Stadium to take the field for the first time since auditions.
